plan_status: adopted, in effect from 20 April 2023 (incorporating Ministerial Direction)
dm_standards_chapter: Appendix 1 - Development Management Guidelines (Volume 1 Written Statement); DM standards are an Appendix, not a numbered chapter
fetch_method: curl raw PDF (28MB) + pdftotext local text extraction (no per-chapter HTML available)
notes: Appendix 1 extracted cleanly: rural one-off minimum site area 0.2ha/0.5ac; sight distances X=2.4m + Y-table by design speed (50-120 km/h); road/cul-de-sac widths; 1m side separation; 11m rear garden; parking standards incl 5% disabled / 10% parent-child; EIA Schedule5 / AA / FRA triggers. Parking Table A3 car/bicycle columns are interleaved in PDF text - per-use car ratios partly ambiguous; flagged in dm_standards.md to consult source Table A3. Density follows national guidelines (no local dwellings/ha table).
